7 I 0

Applying to 11100111
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 1
Output
0 I 5 = 1
1 I 6 = 1
2 I 7 = 1
3 C 3n = NOT(1) = 0
4 C 4n = NOT(1) = 0
5 C 5n = NOT(1) = 0
6 C 6n = NOT(1) = 0
7 I 0 = 1

\boxed{11100001}
